entities.name: Consensus Score
entities.context: Metric measuring agreement level within a theme, calculated as majority mentions divided by total mentions

entities.name: Divergence Score
entities.context: Metric measuring conflict or contradiction within a theme, calculated as absolute difference between support and conflict divided by total mentions

entities.name: Trajectory
entities.context: Metric measuring change in consensus over time between analysis windows

entities.name: Heat Zones
entities.context: Strategic classification system for themes based on their current state and momentum

entities.name: Emerging
entities.context: Heat zone classification for new themes gaining momentum with low consensus, positive trajectory, and low divergence

relationships.context: Trajectory measures change in consensus score between time windows
Heat zone classification uses consensus thresholds (e.g., < 0.5 for emerging)
Heat zone classification uses divergence thresholds (e.g., < 0.3 for emerging)
Heat zone classification uses trajectory thresholds (e.g., > +0.1 for emerging)
Emerging is one classification state within the Heat Zones framework
